name: gingerbread-collab
description: Gingerbread Collab Builder - A collaborative 3D gingerbread house builder

scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.check: npm run test:server && npm run typecheck:client && npm run lint:client && npm run build:client && npm run smoke:local
